prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Pioglitazone 15mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.9 kg; Height 167.4 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 9.2%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 245mg/dL; 3 months ago 251mg/dL; current 215mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.9kg; 9 months ago 69.1kg; 6 months ago 70.2kg; 3 months ago 71.2kg; current 71.9kg), Height (12 months ago 167.4cm; 9 months ago 167.4cm; 6 months ago 167.4cm; 3 months ago 167.4cm; current 167.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 581mg/g; 9 months ago 456mg/g; 6 months ago 711mg/g; 3 months ago 534mg/g; current 766mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 112mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 111mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
